name: Ranch Style Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds boneless beef stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a slow-cooking pot, alternate layers of beef and onions; insert cloves into 4 onions.
2. Sprinkle with sugar and salt.
3. Combine the brown gravy sauce, red wine vinegar, bay leaf, thyme, and water.
4. Pour over the meat.
5. Cover and cook on low for 5 to 7 hours or until tender.
6. Turn off the heat and dissolve the flour in a small amount of water.
7. Stir into the meat juices.
8. Cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes.
